bundle.shortDescription: A minimalist video player for macOS — UI fades away so the film takes center stage.
bundle.longDescription: Glucose Media Player offers a truly minimalist video experience on macOS. The interface fades away when not in use, letting you focus on the content. Move the mouse or press space to reveal the bare-essential playback controls. Glucose plays the most common video and audio formats, supports embedded audio tracks and subtitles, and stays out of your way. Free and open-source under the EUPL 1.2.
